Notcie Of Motion And Motion For Order Removing Case From Arb;
Off Calendar Jan-26-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Defendant City and County of San Francisco's Motion for Order Removing Case From Arbitration is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor objection, the tentative ruling to grant the motion is adopted. The motion is ordered granted. The case is removed from Judicial Arbitration. Order signed. The case is scheduled for Jury Trial on 8/06/2012 at 9:30 AM in Department 206. The court shall give notice of the trial date. The court ordered a Mediation Enforcement Order to Show Cause on 5/09/2012 at 2:00 PM in Department 610.
Judge: Katherine Feinstein; Proceedings not reported. (610)
